intro: Cyclopogon polyaden, also known as Polyadenia or Polyadenia polyadenia, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects, which can aid in the relief of pain, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Cyclopogon polyaden include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
